# arifOS — Constitutional MCP Kernel

arifOS is the constitutional governance kernel of the federation. It is an MCP server with a **public wire facade frozen to 7 canonical verbs**:

- `arif_init`
- `arif_observe`
- `arif_think`
- `arif_route`
- `arif_judge`
- `arif_act`
- `arif_seal`

Everything else in the generated registry is internal, gated, diagnostic, or backward-compat. Default public `tools/list` should resolve to these 7 verbs only.

## Canonical MCP alignment

- **Protocol version:** `2025-11-25`
- **Transport:** Streamable HTTP over JSON-RPC 2.0
- **Public MCP endpoint:** `https://mcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp`
- **Runtime health JSON:** `https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/health`
- **POST requirement:** send `Accept: application/json`
- **Golden flow:** `initialize` → `tools/list` → `tools/call`
- **Governed action path:** `arif_init` → `arif_observe` → `arif_think` → `arif_route` → `arif_judge` → `arif_act` → `arif_seal`

## Live behavior notes

- `arif_init` is the first real tool call for any governed session.
- Unverified actors can initialize successfully but may receive narrowed authority such as `OBSERVE_ONLY`.
- `tools/list` returns the public 7-verb facade by default; diagnostic and legacy aliases are not part of the default public surface.

## Official MCP references

- Intro: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/docs/getting-started/intro.md
- Architecture: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/architecture/index.md
- Lifecycle: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/lifecycle.md
- Transports: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/transports.md
- Server tools: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/server/tools.md
- Authorization: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/authorization.md
- Tasks: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/tasks.md
- Registry: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/registry/about.md
- Full MCP docs index: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/llms.txt

## arifOS source of truth

- `arifosmcp/PUBLIC_SURFACE_CANON.md`
- `arifosmcp/runtime/public_surface.py`
- `arifosmcp/tool_registry.json`
- `README.md`

DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — 999 SEAL ALIVE
